query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "video2gui: synthesizing large-scale interaction trajectories for gener" linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on computational efficiency and performance trade-offs between small and large language models, which is unrelated to the user's specific question about extending a video-to-GUI trajectory synthesis framework using linguistics. It fails to address the core mechanism (video-to-GUI synthesis), the domain (interaction trajectories), or the specific linguistic angle requested, satisfying none of the inclusion criteria (a-f).
